violations.description: FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Whipped garlic butter noted noted not being held at 41 degrees fahrenheit or below. Discarded at this time.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor in prep and ware-washing areas noted in need of cleaning and repair. Floor inside walkin freezer and large walkin cooler behind bar need routine cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Halo Heat and oven noted in need of routine cleaning. Pop gun drains behind bar noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Metal shelving in large walkin cooler behind bar used to store produce noted not in good repair rusting.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained need routine cleaning.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor in food prep / grill area noted not in good repair. Light covers in food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
